title: gutierrezia serotina
intro: Gutierrezia serotina, also known as brittlebrush, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gutierrezia serotina include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers are often used in traditional remedies.
